message:
🐛 Fix 6 test failures in shared-cache-fetch and shared-coverage tests (#10373)

agentFetch now reads agent token from 'kc-agent-token' localStorage key
(via getAgentToken()), not the legacy 'token' key. Tests were using the
wrong key, causing getAgentToken() to issue an unexpected /api/agent/token
fetch that shifted mock.calls indices and left headers undefined.

Fixes:
- shared-coverage: use AGENT_TOKEN_STORAGE_KEY for agentFetch tests
- shared-cache-fetch: set isAgentUnavailable=false and seed kc-agent-token
  for kubectlContext test so agent path is exercised

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
